sourceAmbiguity: PDS or GP data may be optional, missing, or feature-gated in early environments.
decisionTaken: Rendered bounded absence explanations instead of silently omitting external source rows.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Optional enrichment must not be mistaken for missing patient contact truth or preference truth.
operationalRisk: A live provider rollout could change which external rows are available.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Update the feature-gate and source-projection rows without merging them into preferences.
